name: Milanese Risotto

ingredients.item: litres well-flavoured fresh chicken or veal stock
freshly grated parmigiano, plus extra for serving

method: Serves 6 2 litres well-flavoured fresh chicken or veal stock 1 large onion, chopped 125 g unsalted butter 50 ml good-quality virgin olive oil bone marrow (optional, see Note) pinch saffron 500 g carnaroli or arborio rice 300 ml dry white wine 125 g freshly grated parmigiano, plus extra for serving salt and ground black pepper fresh porcini mushrooms, pan-fried, for serving (optional)
Allow the stock to come to the boil in a pan and then turn heat down and simmer.
